column1: # Reviewer smoke-test sheet for bigwig_to_qcat.py and compare_qcat.py
# Replace the BigWig paths with your own files before running.
# This sheet can be used directly with bigwig_to_qcat.py --sheet or
# with compare_qcat.py --sheet, because compare_qcat.py will convert the
# BigWigs to qcat files on the fly when qcat paths are not provided.
#   sample      sample label used in plots
#   replicate   replicate number within the condition
#   bw          comma-separated BigWig paths in category order
#   out         qcat output filename to write for that sample
